content.en:
Empty Clan.

A very low-key race, located in a remote territory of the Void.

The Legendary Realm Lord of the Sky Clan is the Lord of the Sky Slash

The Slash Lord is very low-key in the Void Zone, he has few friends, and he usually acts outside as a clone, so no one knows where the Slash Lord's body is.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the territory of the Sky Clan, and before he got close to the Sky Clan, he was discovered by the Sky Cutting Lord.

Wow!

The Slashing Sky Lord appeared and stopped Ye Tian

The Slashing Lord didn't know Ye Tian, he only knew that Ye Tian was a Legendary Realm Lord.

"Your Excellency, this is my territory, please leave!"

The Slash Lord expelled the way.

Ye Tian smiled slightly: "I just feel that there is an opportunity here that belongs to me, so I will take a look." "

"There's no chance for you here. The Slash Lord said coldly.

"How do you know if you don't go and see? If not, I'll leave here. Ye Tian said.

"Is Your Excellency really my enemy?

The Sky Slash Lord was annoyed, and the space around him was under his control.

Obviously, he is a Legendary Realm Lord who controls space.

"Looks like we're going to have to fight!"

Ye Tian punched out, and six fists were unleashed.

Of course, he didn't use it with all his might, otherwise he would have been able to bombard and kill the Slashing Lord without punches.

Under this punch, the spatial area controlled by the Slashing Lord was directly crushed.

The domineering punch hit the lackluster area where he was, and in an instant, the Slashing Lord was hit hard.

"Top supreme skill, you are the Endless Lord"

The Slash Lord's expression changed.

The Void Region has given birth to a Legendary Realm Lord who can display his top supreme skills, and no matter how low-key he is, the clone still knows the news.

"Yes, it's me!"

Ye Tian said.

Knowing Ye Tian's identity, the Sky Slashing Lord hurriedly flattered: "It turned out that the Endless Lord was visiting, please, I was reckless just now!"

There is no way, he can't beat Ye Tian, if he is really an enemy, he is afraid that he will be killed.

Therefore, it must be recognized.

Ye Tian then followed the Sky Slash Lord and entered the territory of the Sky Clan.

Immediately, his talent for replication shrouded the lackluster area, probing the talents of the Sky Clansmen.

"Sure enough, there are quite a few people who have a legendary-level spatial ancestor!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, not everyone has such a talent, only a small part of them are still ordinary space ancestors.

But even so, the Sky Clan is amazing.

Coupled with the cultivation of the Sky Lord, there are many legendary lords of the Sky Clan, and there are more than a dozen half-step Legendary Realm lords alone.

In the future, the Sky Clan will be able to give birth to a few more Legendary Realm Lords, and if the Sky Slashing Lord himself also breaks through to the peak Legendary Realm Lord realm, the Sky Clan will be able to become the top clan in the Void Region.

However, it is difficult to grow to this point.

"Copy!"

"Copy!"

"Copy!"

The Legendary Spatial Ancestral Endowment of a Gate was copied by Ye Tian.

Ye Tian wandered around the territory of the Sky Clan, and then copied enough Legendary-level Spatial Ancestral Fu.

Subsequently, Ye Tian left the Sky Clan.

After Ye Tian left, the Sky Slashing Lord was puzzled, "Strange, isn't this Endless Lord really just here to see if there is a chance?"

After thinking about it for a long time, he didn't understand it, so he stopped thinking about it.

Anyway, he didn't want to deal with Ye Tian

......

After coming back, Ye Tian began to fuse those legendary-level spatial ancestors.

A door of the legendary space ancestral endowment, coupled with the previous fusion of Ye Tian, gradually, the spatial ancestral endowment is getting stronger and stronger.

Finally, one day, the Space Ancestor completed its transformation and was promoted from a legendary-level Space Ancestor to a Legendary-level Space Ancestor.

After the space ancestor completed the transformation, Ye Tian went to the space again, and the efficiency was improved too much.

"According to this efficiency, the day when I will be in complete control of time will not be too far away!"

Ye Tian muttered.

As the years passed one eternity after another, Ye Tian continued to comprehend the space, and occasionally comprehended other Daos.

Before you know it, sixty eternal epochs have passed.

this day.

The space around Ye Tian has undergone tremendous changes, and the entire space of heaven and earth has been completely controlled by him.

His consciousness spread to Kukai, and Kukai's power was under his control.

He stepped into the empty sea, and even if he didn't use the power of the Legendary Realm Lord, the spatial power here couldn't hurt him in the slightest.

"Finally in control of the space!"

Ye Tian was quite excited.

Now, he controls space, time, and some other Dao, and it is naturally extremely easy to become the peak Legendary Realm Lord.

Once he becomes the peak Legendary Realm Lord, then he is at the peak of his combat power in the Void Region.

After controlling the space, Ye Tian did not immediately go to the peak Legendary Realm Lord Realm, but first stabilized the realm, and then notified the other Legendary Realm Lords of the True No Holy Land.

this day.

Many Legendary Realm Lords of the True Void Holy Land gathered, and even the Lord of the Word came.

"'What is the matter with summoning us this time, Lord of the Endless?'"

Lord Dragongu asked.

Ye Tian said directly: "I control the space!"

Take control of the space!

When the other Legendary Realm Lords heard this, they were immediately shocked.

Although they knew that Ye Tian would definitely control the space, breaking through to become a peak Legendary Realm Lord would not be a problem for him.

However, when they really heard that Ye Tian had controlled the space, they were still extremely shocked.

It's too fast!

In their opinion, Ye Tian will at least need a long time to control the space, after all, Ye Tian's cultivation time is not long, although he has comprehended the ancient desolate monument of time and space, but the cultivation time cannot be erased!

But now, Ye Tian suddenly announced that he controlled the space, how could they not be shocked?

"Endless Lord, when are you going to attack the Peak Legendary Realm Lord?" asked the Immortal Lord.

"After a while, the team. "

Ye Tian said.

"You can rest assured to break through, I will protect you, even if you are a lord of impermanence, don't try to sabotage your promotion. Besides, if you really know that you are going to break through, Lord Wuheng is afraid that he will not dare to come and make trouble. The Lord of the Word said.

"Hmm!" Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian entered the empty sea, and the Legendary Realm Lords of the True Saintless Land guarded it, and several clones and bodies of the Underworld Lord were dispatched, guarding the Quartet respectively.

Immediately, Ye Tian began to attack the peak Legendary Realm Lord realm.

There is no eternal holy land, no measurable mountain.

The Immortal Lord looked at the True Immortal Holy Land, and his expression was shocked: "The Endless Lord has broken through to the Peak Legendary Realm Lord?"
